clinical_blockers: Itching, episodic duration, dermographism, fever, broad allergy labels, blood tests, generic medication plans, fixed one-to-two-week follow-up, and routine urticaria management remain unsupported by opened exact sections.
Skin or mucosal changes alone must not be labelled anaphylaxis; acute urticaria remains clinician-stated.
